title: HexaBiome Premium
description:
simple biome texture pack that help to provide 6 different color variation. its a premium version of Hexabiome texture
version 1.16 to latest
body:
HexaBiome-Premium texture pack.
It's a simple biome texture pack that help to provide 6 different color variation.
after applying this texture pack your Minecraft world will colorful.
there are 6 variety,6 different color grass and trees.
gives you a whole new different experience.
colors are Green, Cherry-Red , Orange , Golden , Pink and Vivid Azure

this pack is compatible with various shaders, with great potential.
it's based of Minecraft simple and colored graphics.


THERE ARE MANY CHANGES IN THE GRAPHICS
CHANGES ARE -
1)Grass
2)Leaves
3)Colormap
4)Environment
5)GUI title
6)Sugarcane

version supported
form- 1.16 to latest



compatible with both single world and servers.

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files



enjoy the pack
make your Minecraft.

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADIND.
